ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference citation for the publication */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the publication (e.g., Scientific Paper, Letter) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* A brief summary of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal if applicable */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the publication is written */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication (e.g., published, draft, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_format FOREIGN KEY ("format") REFERENCES formats ("format_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword itself */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the keyword belongs (e.g., subject area) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_keywords" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., Scientific Paper, Letter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, archivist, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the published work that is cited */,
  "cited_by_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that cites the previous work */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_by_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_by_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that has a version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was published */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Summary of changes in this version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file of this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
column_names: Format of the publication (e.g., Scientific Paper, Letter)
